creator: adrian@freebsd.org
text:
hiya,

I have a Lenovo X230 (ivybridge) which works fine on -HEAD now but the backlight doesn't come on after resume. The laptop itself is fine though. Brightness controls work fine until suspend/resume. The laptop resumes okay and I can type reboot, ssh into it, etc fine.

This worked before the big haswell import.

r297693 definitely doesn't work. :(

I'll try some earlier kernels to see if I can pinpoint when things broke.
